log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+6=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Locathah — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 39 cold damage + .
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:7+6=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
--- Locathah — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 17 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Locathah — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 17 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Archmage (disadvantage protects concentration).

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:3+6=9 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 95/99
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
